name: High-Protien Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. In a separate bowl, combine whole wheat flour, wheat germ, dry milk, and baking powder; mix well.
4. Add dry ingredients alternately with milk to the butter mixture, stirring until combined but not overmixed.
5. Fold in blueberries.
6. Fill greased muffin pans with batter, then sprinkle crumb topping evenly over each muffin.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes. Allow muffins to cool a few minutes before removing from the pan.
Crumb Topping:
1/4 cup Brown sugar, packed
1/3 cup Whole wheat flour
1/2 tsp Cinnamon
1/4 cup Butter or margarine
TIPS:
- Butter, especially sweet butter, adds a special flavor to the muffins. If using sweet butter, add 1/2 teaspoon salt to the dry ingredients.
- Nutrition Note: The wheat germ increases the protein value of the flour by nearly doubling it, while the dry milk further boosts the protein content by 50%.
